description: Zoho MCP is Zoho's Model Context Protocol offering for connecting AI agents with Zoho applications and other business services. The zohomcp.com domain appears to be a lightweight landing/metadata domain rather than the host for developer-callable APIs, CLIs, GraphQL, or MCP endpoints.
summary: No developer integration surfaces were confirmed on zohomcp.com itself; the domain currently exposes only an llms.txt page that points users to Zoho-hosted product pages on zoho.com.
